channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Man's Remains Confirm Identity Of Grand Canyon Hiker Missing For Nearly 15 Years

media:content.media:description: Authorities have not yet shared a cause of death.

item.description: Working with the Arizona Department of Public Safety, authorities confirmed through DNA analysis that the remains belonged to Ott.
item.content:encoded: Working with the Arizona Department of Public Safety, authorities confirmed through DNA analysis that the remains belonged to Ott.

item.title: Trump Hits China, Israel With 12.5% New Tariffs. Why He Put India At 10%

media:content.media:description: After the latest measure, the total tariff imposed on India will remain at 10 per cent.

item.description: Nations that enforced such laws -- including India, Sri Lanka, and the European Union -- will be hit with 10 per cent levies if they fail to enforce them.
item.content:encoded: Nations that enforced such laws -- including India, Sri Lanka, and the European Union -- will be hit with 10 per cent levies if they fail to enforce them.

item.title: 'Correcting Human Rights Abuse': US Slaps New Tariffs On India, 59 Countries

media:content.media:description: This week, Trump also ordered new 50-percent tariffs on many Canadian products.

item.description: The United States said Thursday that it would impose new tariffs on 60 trading partners over forced labor concerns, replacing an expiring global duty rolled out by President Donald Trump earlier this year.
item.content:encoded: The United States said Thursday that it would impose new tariffs on 60 trading partners over forced labor concerns, replacing an expiring global duty rolled out by President Donald Trump earlier this year.

item.title: US Strikes Iran As Tensions Escalate Over Shipping Routes In Hormuz
item.description: The US military announced Thursday that it is conducting the 13th night of strikes against Iran as clashes escalate over shipping routes.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1132259/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The US military announced Thursday that it is conducting the 13th night of strikes against Iran as clashes escalate over shipping routes.

item.title: Government Bars Communication Infra Providers From Sharing Data Outside India
item.description: The government has barred communication infrastructure providers, including those involved in cloud-based networks for telecom services, mobile towers and satellite gateways, from sharing any data outside the country, according to an official notification.
item.content:encoded: The government has barred communication infrastructure providers, including those involved in cloud-based networks for telecom services, mobile towers and satellite gateways, from sharing any data outside the country, according to an official notification.

item.title: US Says Won't Block Tate Brothers' Extradition To UK Over Rape Charges

media:content.media:description: The Tates are challenging their extradition.

item.description: US President Donald Trump will not stop the extradition of influencer Andrew Tate and his brother Tristan to Britain on sex crime charges, the White House said on Thursday.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump will not stop the extradition of influencer Andrew Tate and his brother Tristan to Britain on sex crime charges, the White House said on Thursday.

item.title: Trump Says Frozen Iranian Assets Will Pay For Damage To Shipping

media:content.media:description: Trump said that the US would begin using frozen Iranian assets to pay for ships and cargo damaged.

item.description: President Donald Trump said Thursday that the US would begin using frozen Iranian assets to pay for ships and cargo damaged by strikes in and around the Gulf.
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump said Thursday that the US would begin using frozen Iranian assets to pay for ships and cargo damaged by strikes in and around the Gulf.

item.title: Salman Rushdie Testifies At Knife Attacker's US Terror Trial

media:content.media:description: Rushdie lived in seclusion in London for a decade after the 1989 fatwa.

item.description: Novelist Salman Rushdie on Thursday testified at the federal trial of the man who tried to kill him with a knife at a New York cultural center in 2022.
item.content:encoded: Novelist Salman Rushdie on Thursday testified at the federal trial of the man who tried to kill him with a knife at a New York cultural center in 2022.

item.title: Trump Says Xi Jinping Will Visit US On September 24
item.description: US President Donald Trump said on Thursday that he will discuss artificial intelligence with Chinese President Xi Jinping when he visits the United States on September 24.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said on Thursday that he will discuss artificial intelligence with Chinese President Xi Jinping when he visits the United States on September 24.

item.title: Trump Says Iran Has "Some Evil Intentions", Cannot Be Allowed To Have Nukes

media:content.media:description: Trump said that Iran cannot be allowed to even consider acquiring nuclear weapons.

item.description: US President Donald Trump on Thursday reiterated his stance that Tehran cannot be allowed to have nuclear weapons and that Washington is doing "extremely well" as the conflict continues between the two adversaries.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump on Thursday reiterated his stance that Tehran cannot be allowed to have nuclear weapons and that Washington is doing "extremely well" as the conflict continues between the two adversaries.

item.title: Trump Reports Over $1.4 Billion In Income From Crypto Ventures

media:content.media:description: Trump reported another $635 million from the sale of his Trump meme coins.

item.description: The filings, his annual disclosure for 2025 with the US Office of Government Ethics, disclosed that his companies received almost $800 million from World Liberty Financial, a crypto venture he and his sons co-founded.
item.content:encoded: The filings, his annual disclosure for 2025 with the US Office of Government Ethics, disclosed that his companies received almost $800 million from World Liberty Financial, a crypto venture he and his sons co-founded.

item.title: "Not Enough Pain": Report Says Trump May Decide On "Massive" Iran Attack Soon

media:content.media:description: Trump said Iran has shown interest in negotiations but insisted Tehran is not ready to strike a deal

item.description: Speaking to Axios on Thursday, Trump said he has not yet made a final decision on it but that such an attack would have consequences.
item.content:encoded: Speaking to Axios on Thursday, Trump said he has not yet made a final decision on it but that such an attack would have consequences.

item.title: Woman Laughs At Movie Scene In Theatre, Annoyed Man Hits Her With Pizza Pan

media:content.media:description: A 24-year-old woman suffered injuries after a man hit her with a pizza pan in a Florida theatre.

item.description: The unnamed woman, 24, went to the Cinepolis Luxury Cinemas in Coconut Grove with a group of friends on Sunday when she was hit with a pizza pan.
item.content:encoded: The unnamed woman, 24, went to the Cinepolis Luxury Cinemas in Coconut Grove with a group of friends on Sunday when she was hit with a pizza pan.

item.title: Bangladesh Picks 'Controversial' Journalists For India Missions, Raises Brows

media:content.media:description: Both countries have been making genuine noises about resetting relations after a bruising stretch

item.description: Both countries have been making noises about resetting relations after a bruising stretch following the political upheaval that swept Sheikh Hasina from power in August 2024. Appointing press officers with a visible history of India-critical posts isn't the reset either side was hoping to advertise.
item.content:encoded: Both countries have been making noises about resetting relations after a bruising stretch following the political upheaval that swept Sheikh Hasina from power in August 2024. Appointing press officers with a visible history of India-critical posts isn't the reset either side was hoping to advertise.

item.title: Saadia Zahidi Becomes First Woman Chief Of International Aviation Body

media:content.media:description: Zahidi is currently with the World Economic Forum.

item.description: In a release, IATA said Zahidi would be the ninth Director General and the first woman appointed to hold the position and would take charge from November 1.
item.content:encoded: In a release, IATA said Zahidi would be the ninth Director General and the first woman appointed to hold the position and would take charge from November 1.

item.title: Eating Fire For Breakfast: Hungry Donkeys Turn Firefighters In Spain

media:content.media:description: The donkeys get what a "dignified life", while their daily grazing helps make forests safer

item.description: According to a report by CNN, instead of carrying hoses, donkeys are eating their way through the dry vegetation that fuels wildfires.
item.content:encoded: According to a report by CNN, instead of carrying hoses, donkeys are eating their way through the dry vegetation that fuels wildfires.

item.title: "Major Military Punishment": Trump's Threat To Houthis Over Red Sea Attacks

media:content.media:description: This comes after Houthis launched missile and drone strikes on oil tankers in the Red Sea.

item.description: Trump said that the US will hold Iran responsible for Houthi attacks.
item.content:encoded: Trump said that the US will hold Iran responsible for Houthi attacks.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | A New US-Israel Defence Bill Has Opened An Unexpected Door For India
item.description: The phrase "integration of the US and Israeli militaries" has become popular because it captures attention. It also obscures the more important story.
item.content:encoded: The phrase "integration of the US and Israeli militaries" has become popular because it captures attention. It also obscures the more important story.

item.title: US-Saudi Nuclear Agreement Hinges On Riyadh Recognising Israel: Trump

media:content.media:description: Trump's announcement follows a landmark US-Saudi civilian nuclear deal

item.description: The deal to establish a civilian nuclear program in Saudi Arabia "will be approved, but is totally subject to Saudi Arabia joining the very respected and successful Abraham Accords," Trump said.
item.content:encoded: The deal to establish a civilian nuclear program in Saudi Arabia "will be approved, but is totally subject to Saudi Arabia joining the very respected and successful Abraham Accords," Trump said.

item.title: Secret Service Agent Suspended For 'Leaking' JD Vance's Travel Details

media:content.media:description: The employee revealed details about agents being "fed up" with Vance's last-minute personal travel

item.description: The agency's internal affairs component has opened an investigation into it; however, it is unclear if the agent could face administrative punishment or criminal charges.
item.content:encoded: The agency's internal affairs component has opened an investigation into it; however, it is unclear if the agent could face administrative punishment or criminal charges.
